targets.query:
heatpump = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.meter == "heatpump" or r.meter == "extra")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Total_Active_Power")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

lights = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lights" and r._field == "is_on")
  |> toFloat()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value * float(v: ${watt_per_light}) / 1000.0}))
  |> group()

sauna = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Sauna")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> derivative(unit: 1m, nonNegative: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value > 0.05 then 1.0 else 0.0}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value * 6.0}))
  |> group()

hvac = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and (r.sensor_name == "Keittio" or r.sensor_name == "Keittiö"))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressure")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: ${watt_fan}) / 1000.0}))
  |> group()

union(tables: [heatpump, lights, sauna, hvac])
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "total"}))

import "join"

heatpump = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.meter == "heatpump" or r.meter == "extra")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Total_Active_Power")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

lights = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lights" and r._field == "is_on")
  |> toFloat()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value * float(v: ${watt_per_light}) / 1000.0}))
  |> group()

sauna = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Sauna")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> derivative(unit: 1m, nonNegative: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value > 0.05 then 1.0 else 0.0}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value * 6.0}))
  |> group()

hvac = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and (r.sensor_name == "Keittio" or r.sensor_name == "Keittiö"))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressure")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: ${watt_fan}) / 1000.0}))
  |> group()

energy = union(tables: [heatpump, lights, sauna, hvac])
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> group()

price = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "electricity" and r._field == "price_with_tax")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value + 0.49 + 6.09}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

join.inner(
  left: energy,
  right: price,
  on: (l, r) => l._time == r._time,
  as: (l, r) => ({_time: l._time, _value: l._value * r._value / 100.0}),
)
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "total_cost"}))

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "electricity" and r._field == "price_with_tax")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value + 0.49 + 6.09}))

heatpump = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.meter == "heatpump" or r.meter == "extra")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Total_Active_Power")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Lampopumppu"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

lights = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lights" and r._field == "is_on")

  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value * float(v: ${watt_per_light}) / 1000.0, _field: "Valaistus"}))
  |> group()

sauna = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Sauna")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> derivative(unit: 1m, nonNegative: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value > 0.05 then 1.0 else 0.0}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value * 6.0, _field: "Sauna"}))
  |> group()

hvac = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and (r.sensor_name == "Keittio" or r.sensor_name == "Keittiö"))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressure")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: ${watt_fan}) / 1000.0, _field: "IV-kone"}))
  |> group()

union(tables: [heatpump, lights, sauna, hvac])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _value: r._value, _field: r._field}))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> drop(columns: ["_time"])

heatpump = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.meter == "heatpump" or r.meter == "extra")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Total_Active_Power")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Lampopumppu"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

lights = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lights" and r._field == "is_on")
  |> toFloat()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])

  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value * float(v: ${watt_per_light}) / 1000.0, _field: "Valaistus"}))
  |> group()

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Sauna")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> derivative(unit: 1m, nonNegative: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value > 0.05 then 1.0 else 0.0}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value * 6.0, _field: "Sauna"}))
  |> group()

hvac = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and (r.sensor_name == "Keittio" or r.sensor_name == "Keittiö"))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressure")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: ${watt_fan}) / 1000.0, _field: "IV-kone"}))
  |> group()

union(tables: [heatpump, lights, sauna, hvac])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

join.inner(
  left: energy,
  right: price,
  on: (l, r) => l._time == r._time,
  as: (l, r) => ({_time: l._time, _value: l._value * r._value / 100.0, _field: l._field}),
)
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "electricity" and r._field == "price_with_tax")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value + 0.49 + 6.09, _field: "Sahkohinta"}))

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "electricity" and r._field == "price_with_tax")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value + 0.49 + 6.09}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Kokonaishinta")

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "electricity" and r._field == "price_with_tax")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Spot + ALV")

import "join"
import "math"

heatpump = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.meter == "heatpump" or r.meter == "extra")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Total_Active_Power")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Lampopumppu"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

lights = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lights" and r._field == "is_on")
  |> toFloat()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value * float(v: ${watt_per_light}) / 1000.0, _field: "Valaistus"}))
  |> group()

sauna = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Sauna")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> derivative(unit: 1m, nonNegative: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value > 0.05 then 1.0 else 0.0}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value * 6.0, _field: "Sauna"}))
  |> group()

hvac = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and (r.sensor_name == "Keittio" or r.sensor_name == "Keittiö"))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressure")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: ${watt_fan}) / 1000.0, _field: "IV-kone"}))
  |> group()

energy = union(tables: [heatpump, lights, sauna, hvac])

price = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "electricity" and r._field == "price_with_tax")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value + 0.49 + 6.09}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

cost = join.inner(
  left: energy,
  right: price,
  on: (l, r) => l._time == r._time,
  as: (l, r) => ({_time: l._time, cost: l._value * r._value / 100.0, energy: l._value, _field: l._field}),
)

total_energy = cost
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "energy")
  |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "energy")

cost
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({
    kwh: accumulator.kwh + r.energy,
    cost: accumulator.cost + r.cost,
    count: accumulator.count + 1.0,
  }), identity: {kwh: 0.0, cost: 0.0, count: 0.0})
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
    Kuluttaja: r._field,
    "Kulutus (kWh)": r.kwh,
    "Keskiteho (kW)": r.kwh / r.count,
    "Kustannus (EUR)": r.cost,
    "Osuus (%)": if total_energy[0] > 0.0 then r.kwh / total_energy[0] * 100.0 else 0.0,
  }))
  |> group()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "power" and r.meter == "heatpump")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Total_Active_Power")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "power" and r.meter == "extra")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Total_Active_Power")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "energy" and r.meter == "heatpump")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Total_Active_Energy")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "energy" and r.meter == "extra")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Total_Active_Energy")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "voltage" and r.meter == "heatpump")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Grid_Frequency")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Total_Active_Power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.meter == "heatpump" or r.meter == "extra")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: if r.meter == "heatpump" then "Maalämpöpumppu" else "Lisävastus"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "voltage" and r.meter == "heatpump")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "L1_Voltage" or r._field == "L2_Voltage" or r._field == "L3_Voltage")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "power" and r.meter == "heatpump")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "L1_Active_Power" or r._field == "L2_Active_Power" or r._field == "L3_Active_Power")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "current" and r.meter == "heatpump")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "L1_Current" or r._field == "L2_Current" or r._field == "L3_Current")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Total_Active_Energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.meter == "heatpump" or r.meter == "extra")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: if r.meter == "heatpump" then "Maalämpöpumppu" else "Lisävastus"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
